sauravcode: sauravdoctor — autonomous code health diagnostic tool with 20 pathology detectors, health scoring, HTML report
agentlens: Auto-Triage Engine — unified /triage endpoint + CLI that runs health scoring, anomaly detection, baseline drift, error analysis, and cost analysis in one call with prioritized findings and remediation suggestions

Session Autopsy — autonomous multi-engine root-cause investigation: orchestrates 6 analysis engines (anomaly detection, health scoring, error analysis, latency profiling, token analysis, tool analysis), builds causal evidence chains, generates ranked root-cause hypotheses with confidence scores, P0-P4 priority classification, remediation playbook with effort estimates, CLI integration (36 tests)
VoronoiMap: vormap_resilience — spatial resilience analyzer: failure simulation, criticality ranking, cascade analysis, redundancy suggestions, what-if scenarios, HTML report

vormap_guardian — autonomous spatial constraint enforcement: 8 constraint types (MinSpacing, MaxSpacing, ExclusionZone, InclusionZone, DensityCap, DensityFloor, SymmetryAxis, CountBounds), iterative auto-repair, compliance scoring, interactive HTML dashboard (41 tests)
agenticchat: Smart Auto-Continue — autonomous truncation detection (unclosed code blocks, mid-sentence cutoffs, continuation markers, incomplete lists) with automatic continuation and seamless response merging (Alt+Shift+U)

SmartFactMemory — autonomous fact/decision/preference/action-item extractor with persistent cross-session knowledge base, searchable panel, category filters, pinning, export, context menu integration (Alt+Shift+F, 22 tests)
GraphVisual: Graph Intelligence Advisor — proactive analysis recommender that fingerprints graph structure and generates ranked recommendations with confidence scores, reasoning, and HTML reports

GraphAutoPilot — autonomous graph optimization planner: 6 weakness diagnostics (bridges, articulation points, degree imbalance, disconnected components, peripherals, diameter), 5 action types (bypass, peripheral connect, hub reinforcement, community bridging, shortcuts), health scoring 0-100, impact simulation with before/after delta, interactive HTML dashboard (28 tests)
prompt: PromptAutoImprover — autonomous multi-pass prompt improvement engine with quality scoring across 7 dimensions, 8 improvement passes, 3 intensity levels, HTML reports
ai: Autonomous Investigation Engine — self-directed multi-module safety investigation: incident classification, 8 investigation playbooks, adaptive depth escalation, cross-module correlation, root cause analysis, text/JSON/HTML reports

Threat Adaptation Engine — autonomous 3-phase threat landscape monitoring (scan → shift detection → adaptation planning): 16 threat vectors with composite scoring, JSONL history with trend detection via linear regression, shift alerts (new/escalating/retreating/volatility/pressure), 15-control catalog with prioritized recommendations (tighten/relax/add/retire/rebalance/monitor), budget constraints, interactive HTML dashboard, CLI with scan/compare/plan/history subcommands (27 tests)
metacognition: Consensus Autopilot — autonomous self-governing swarm task processor with adaptive threshold tuning, agent quarantine/reinstatement, health monitoring, pluggable task sources, CLI + HTML dashboard

Swarm Memory — persistent episodic learning: episode recording, pattern extraction, success prediction, configuration recommender with forgetting curve, memory health self-diagnostics, JSON persistence, interactive HTML dashboard (37 tests)
BioBots: Parameter Drift Detector — autonomous statistical drift monitoring with CUSUM, variance analysis, trend estimation, mean-shift detection, root cause inference, corrective recommendations, multi-parameter correlation, forecast, interactive HTML dashboard (18 tests)

Lab Resource Forecaster — autonomous consumption monitoring with weighted moving average rates, trend-adjusted depletion forecasting, multi-level reorder urgency, expiration risk detection, waste analysis via outlier detection, procurement optimization with bulk ordering (32 tests)
Vidly: Store Pulse Monitor — autonomous multi-signal health dashboard: 7 weighted signals (inventory utilization, revenue velocity, overdue rate, customer activity, late fee burden, genre diversity, return compliance), z-score anomaly detection, auto-generated action items with priority/impact/automatable flags, trend analysis, rich interactive dashboard with score gauge, JSON API endpoints
WinSentinel: Security Canary Network — honeypot/tripwire file deployment and monitoring: 5 canary types (Credential, Config, Database, Document, Registry), trip alerts with process attribution and MITRE ATT&CK mapping, network health scoring, threat level assessment, --canary-trips-only filter, JSON output

Autonomous Threat Hunt Engine — proactive hypothesis-driven threat hunting: 8 MITRE-mapped hypotheses (lateral movement, persistence, privilege escalation, data exfiltration, defense evasion, shadow admins, stale credentials, phantom activity), evidence correlation, threat scoring, prioritized action plans, rich CLI output
gif-captcha: Challenge Autopilot — autonomous challenge lifecycle controller: outcome tracking, evaluate (retire/quarantine/promote/boost/demote), smart session-context-aware selection, quarantine system, self-monitoring with decision accuracy tracking, situation reports, interactive HTML dashboard (34 tests)
everything: Life Experiment Engine — autonomous self-experimentation framework: hypothesis-driven experiments with baseline vs intervention periods, Welch's t-test, Cohen's d effect size, p-value approximation, autonomous insight generation (outliers, trends, variability, weekend/weekday patterns), 7 curated experiment suggestions, evidence-based verdicts with confidence levels (25+ tests)
FeedReader: FeedInterestEvolver — autonomous interest evolution tracker: periodic snapshots, phase classification (emerging/growing/stable/cyclical/fading/dormant), momentum detection via linear regression, cyclical pattern detection, future interest prediction via EMA, curiosity metrics (breadth, HHI depth, Shannon entropy), intellectual biography generation (22 tests)
Ocaml-sample-code: Learning Path Advisor — autonomous knowledge assessment and personalized learning path generator: 30 concept categories with dependency graph, 15-question adaptive quiz, skill-level inference, topological sort path generation, gap analysis, confidence-scored recommendations, progress tracking, interactive REPL
getagentbox: Scenario Planner — interactive agentic planning demo: 5 preset scenarios + custom input, 4-phase animated action plans (Understand → Plan → Execute → Monitor), step-by-step processing animation, summary stats with actions count and time saved
